segments.text: Curious watching him try to escape
segments.original_text: estoy un poquito curioso intentándose de quitar
porque no se quiere mantener ahí cerca

segments.text: From Spargo, that Rage Ram keeps coming out
segments.original_text: de lo que puede ser Spargo, el Rage Ram que lleva saliendo

segments.text: That incredible parry and he lands it!
segments.original_text: el parry fenomenal y claro lo agarra

full_text: Pretty sketchy Yeah, honestly Curious watching him try to escape Doesn't want to stick around From Spargo, that Rage Ram keeps coming out That incredible parry and he lands it!
